title: HMA-Kahlman Trend & Trendlines

summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: HMA-Kahlman Trend & Trendlines by NPR21.

HMA-Kahlman Trend & Trendlines Pine Script™ v6 | Overlay Indicator by NPR21 Publication Description A professional-grade trend identification and dynamic trendline indicator that combines two powerful analytical modules into a single overlay.
The HMA-Kahlman Trend Module applies an optional Kalman filter to the Hull Moving Average for ultra-smooth, low-lag trend detection.
